name: agriculture_classroom_monitoring_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A Agriculture response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving agriculture classroom monitoring marrowbridge tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Ansel Kim
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kim, accountable for a defensible call in Agriculture when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Sana Bennett
agents.identity: I am Sana Bennett, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Agriculture.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Ansel Kim must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Ansel Kim do?
